cards.meaning: particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?"; "And ...?"); particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?"); particle signaling a pause; to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?"; "are you with me?"); (at the end of a declarative sentence) particle indicating continuation of a state or action; particle indicating strong affirmation
to be able to; to be capable of; ability; capability; able; capable; can possibly; (usually used in the negative) to have the possibility of
you (informal; as opposed to courteous 您)
coin; money; CL:筆|笔[bǐ]; unit of weight; one tenth of a tael 兩|两[liǎng]
